hero_h1: A pantry of icons, sourced direct.
hero_lede: Over thirty heritage Asian brands distributed under one roof. Direct manufacturer relationships keep pricing competitive and supply consistent — from AROY-D's Thai coconut milk to Singha's lager, from Healthy Boy's naturally-brewed soy to Mae Ploy's fifty-year-old sweet chilli.
spot_desc: Pure-pressed, no stabilisers, no preservatives. Trusted by Michelin chefs and 450+ UK kitchens. Available in 400ml, 1L UHT and catering-case sizes.
